purpose: Record the focused Mobility & Positioning sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.spatialAutomation: Do not automate pathfinding, adjacency, threatened squares, line of sight, token placement, forced movement, or destination legality in this pass. Runtime helpers expose eligible rider choices for workflow/UI/GM adjudication.
policy.alreadyCovered: Charge, Bantha Rush, Improved Bantha Rush, Running Attack, Charging Fire, Powerful Charge, Improved Charge, and Deft Charge are already normalized by core attack-option hooks.
policy.invalidEntries: Do not implement Wounding Strike, Spring Attack, Reckless Charge, or Heroic Surge as feats. They were rejected by the strict Combat validity audit.

implementedEntries.name: Bantha Herder
implementedEntries.mechanic: Damaging ranged attack rider. Runtime helper checks ranged damage, proficient weapon context, target size, grabbed/grappled flags, and attack total vs Will Defense, then exposes eligible 1-square target forced movement advisories.

implementedEntries.name: Fleet-Footed
implementedEntries.mechanic: Running Attack rider. The helper returns the +2-square end-of-turn speed bonus only when workflow context confirms Running Attack plus movement before and after the attack.

implementedEntries.name: Tactical Advantage
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack-of-Opportunity damage rider. Runtime helper exposes immediate 1-square self-movement, no AoO, after damaging Attack of Opportunity context.

implementedEntries.name: Opportunistic Retreat
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack-of-Opportunity replacement rider. Runtime helper exposes once-per-turn option to sacrifice the AoO and move one-half Speed without provoking Attacks of Opportunity.

implementedEntries.name: Impulsive Flight
implementedEntries.mechanic: Withdraw action rider. Runtime helper returns +1 extra square for Withdraw action context.

implementedEntries.name: Steadying Position
implementedEntries.mechanic: Records stable/stationary positioning state metadata for later attack workflows.

implementedEntries.name: Cornered
implementedEntries.mechanic: Player-selectable advisory attack option. When selected in attack context, applies +2 attack bonus through CombatOptionResolver; spatial validity remains player/GM/workflow adjudicated.

excludedEntries.name: Wounding Strike
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.

excludedEntries.name: Spring Attack
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.

excludedEntries.name: Reckless Charge
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.

excludedEntries.name: Heroic Surge
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.
